condition_types.flag_present: A specific flag was detected. Optional min_confidence threshold.
condition_types.any_flag_present: Any of the listed flags was detected. Optional min_confidence threshold.
condition_types.domain_present: Any flag in the specified domain was detected.
condition_types.domain_severity: Any flag in the specified domain reached at least the given severity. Evaluated after escalation rules.
condition_types.temporal_context: The temporal qualifier of the matched text (past or present).
condition_types.emotion_above: A Layer 3 emotion score exceeds the given threshold. Use sparingly; flag co-occurrence is preferred over raw emotion scores for clinical decisions.
condition_types.domain_flag_count: Total count of detected flags and L2 candidate detections in a domain meets or exceeds min_count. L1 pattern matches (post-negation, post-temporal) always count. Set include_l2_candidates: true to also count Layer 2 detections that scored above candidate_threshold (0.4) but below emit_threshold (0.7). No fuzzy matching — L1 is always binary.

action_types.escalate_flag: Set a specific detected flag's severity to new_severity.
action_types.escalate_flags: Set severity for all listed flags that were detected to new_severity.
action_types.reduce_severity_by: Reduce severity by N levels (CRITICAL > HIGH > MEDIUM > LOW).
action_types.set_requires_immediate_review: Mark the session for immediate clinical review.
action_types.recommended_action: Set or append a recommended clinical action string.

schema.evaluation_order: escalation_rules first, then de_escalation_rules, then compound_rules, then action_rules. Within each category, rules are evaluated in array order.

escalation_rules.description: Passive SI combined with hopelessness escalates to CRITICAL
Self-injury combined with active substance use escalates NSSI to CRITICAL — substances lower inhibition and increase progression risk from NSSI to suicidal behavior

action.recommended_action: Assess for suicidal intent in context of active substance use and self-injury

escalation_rules.description: Active SI combined with command auditory hallucinations — command AH directing self-harm is an acute emergency

action.recommended_action: Immediate safety assessment. Active SI with command hallucinations requires emergency evaluation.

escalation_rules.description: Homicidal ideation combined with substance use escalates HI to CRITICAL — intoxication amplifies violence risk and impulsivity

action.recommended_action: Violence risk assessment. Substance use with homicidal ideation requires immediate provider notification.

escalation_rules.description: Mania indicators combined with risky substance behavior escalates CD-008 to CRITICAL — common bipolar destabilization pattern

action.recommended_action: Assess for manic episode with substance-involved destabilization. Consider acute psychiatric evaluation.

escalation_rules.description: Prior suicide attempt combined with current SI — history of attempt is among the strongest predictors of future suicidal behavior

action.recommended_action: Administer C-SSRS. Prior attempt history with current ideation is a high-risk combination.

escalation_rules.description: Hopelessness combined with severe isolation escalates both to CRITICAL — removes protective factors and allows risk to escalate unmonitored

action.recommended_action: Assess for acute decompensation. Hopelessness with severe isolation is a high-risk combination.

escalation_rules.description: Active SI combined with any destabilizing factor — substance use, withdrawal, severe isolation, or medication misuse each independently amplify near-term suicide risk

action.recommended_action: Active SI with destabilizing co-occurring factor. Administer C-SSRS and assess for immediate safety intervention.

escalation_rules.description: Active SI combined with high agitation — agitation increases impulsivity and shortens the path from ideation to action

action.recommended_action: Active SI with agitation. Agitated patients are at elevated risk of impulsive action. Prioritize immediate safety assessment.

escalation_rules.description: Homicidal ideation combined with high anger — intense anger amplifies violence risk and reduces impulse control

action.recommended_action: Homicidal ideation with elevated anger. Immediate violence risk assessment required.

de_escalation_rules.description: Historical references reduce severity by one level

compound_rules.description: Co-occurring substance use and self-harm flags require immediate review

action.recommended_action: Assess for co-occurring substance use and suicidal risk

compound_rules.description: Anxiety-to-psychosis escalation: co-occurring anxiety and psychosis flags indicate possible decompensation requiring immediate review

action.recommended_action: Evaluate for psychotic decompensation with anxiety prodrome; consider acute psychiatric assessment

compound_rules.description: Signal density: multiple sub-threshold self-harm indicators suggest accumulated preparatory or risk behavior across the text

action.recommended_action: Multiple self-harm indicators detected across the text. Review the full note for accumulated risk signals.

compound_rules.description: Signal density: multiple sub-threshold harm-to-others indicators suggest accumulated violent risk across the text

action.recommended_action: Multiple harm-to-others indicators detected across the text. Review the full note for accumulated violence risk signals.

compound_rules.description: Medication misuse or stockpiling combined with any self-harm signal — stockpiling medication while expressing SI may indicate preparatory behavior

action.recommended_action: Assess for preparatory behavior. Medication misuse or stockpiling co-occurring with self-harm signals may indicate means acquisition.

compound_rules.description: Homicidal ideation combined with paranoid ideation — paranoia can drive defensive violence and increase plausibility of acting on HI

action.recommended_action: Violence risk assessment with focus on paranoia-driven threat perception. Evaluate reality testing.

compound_rules.description: Self-injury combined with passive SI — NSSI with death wish suggests escalating risk even when neither alone is CRITICAL

action.recommended_action: Administer C-SSRS. Active self-injury with passive death wish indicates escalating risk.

compound_rules.description: Any high-acuity presentation across multiple domains suggests complex destabilization requiring coordinated review

action.recommended_action: Multi-domain presentation with 3+ domains flagged. Coordinate multidisciplinary review.

action_rules.description: Prompt C-SSRS administration for any CRITICAL self-harm flag
